{
  "title": "Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back Fast",
  "meta_description": "Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights, what landlords can legally deduct, and how to send a demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99.",
  "content_outline": [
    "Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Start Here",
    "What Your Landlord Can (and Cannot) Legally Deduct",
    "State Deadlines: How Long Does a Landlord Have to Return Your Deposit?",
    "DIY Demand Letter vs. Hiring a Lawyer: What's Faster?",
    "How to Send a Security Deposit Demand Letter in 60 Seconds"
  ],
  "key_points": [
    "Landlords must return security deposits within a state-specific timeframe (typically 14–30 days) and provide an itemized deduction list.",
    "Normal wear and tear cannot be deducted; only damage beyond ordinary use qualifies for legitimate withholding.",
    "Tenants have the right to dispute wrongful deductions and demand the full return of their deposit in writing.",
    "A professionally drafted demand letter often forces landlord compliance before small claims court becomes necessary.",
    "Deposits-Back.com offers a flat-fee ($19.99), 60-second demand letter generator with no signup or subscription required."
  ],
  "cta": "Stop waiting. Generate your security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99. No signup. No subscription. Just your money back.",
  "target_audience": "Problem-aware US renters who have recently moved out and are experiencing a landlord withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting their security deposit.",

    "tiktok_reel_hooks": [
      "Your landlord can't just keep your deposit because they feel like it. 🚩",
      "If your landlord hasn't returned your deposit in 30 days, watch this. ⏱️",
      "POV: You left the apartment spotless but they're charging you a 'cleaning fee.' 🧹❌",
      "Stop arguing with your landlord in the comments. Send this instead. 📨",
      "My landlord won't give me my deposit back. So I did this. ⚖️"
    ],
    "short_form_scripts": [
      {
        "hook": "If your landlord hasn't returned your deposit in 30 days, watch this.",
        "visual": "Phone screen showing unread texts to landlord after move-out.",
        "script": "You moved out. You cleaned everything. Now your landlord is ghosting you. Here's the truth
